title: bidens chrysanthemifolia var. typica
intro: Bidens chrysanthemifolia var. typica, also known as yellow biddis, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bidens chrysanthemifolia var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
